name: The Turn
about: The Turn is an indoor golf simulator lounge in Victorville, CA, offering an immersive experience using state-of-the-art ball tracking and club data analytics. The facility provides a relaxed, social atmosphere with advanced simulators that deliver real-time data on ball speed, spin, and launch angle, catering to all skill levels. With a focus on a fun, stress-free environment, The Turn features a variety of virtual courses, food, drinks, and entertainment, making it ideal for casual hangouts, corporate events, and future golf lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art ball tracking and club data analytics
Variety of virtual courses from around the world
Relaxed social atmosphere with food and drinks
Accurate real-time data to refine your game
Ideal for both practice and casual play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are provided on-site for your use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted, but The Turn offers food and drinks for purchase on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, it takes about 2-3 hours to play 18 holes, depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is The Turn kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Turn welcomes families and offers a relaxed atmosphere suitable for all ages.
